title: MAN Hosts Summit to Boost Manufacturing Sector’s Competitiveness - FinancialEDGE
description: Manufacturers Association of Nigeria (MAN) has concluded plans to host the Nigeria Manufacturers Summit. According to its Director General, Segun Ajayi-Kadir, mni, the Summit, which was initially planned for June, is now scheduled to hold from July 2nd to 4th, 2024, at the prestigious State House Banquet Hall, Abuja. The summit will kick off at
html: Manufacturers Association of Nigeria (MAN) has concluded plans to host the Nigeria Manufacturers Summit.
